title: Copper Carrots
description: This mod adds a new use for copper in the form of copper carrots! They're like golden carrots, but worse!
body:
This mod adds a new use for copper in the form of copper carrots! They're like golden carrots, but worse!

![A copper carrot floating over grass, text that is printed above the carrot reads "Copper Carrots" in the minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c691379f4ddaf8a40d5a7eb1299609e06b7a674f.png)

Copper ingots can now be broken apart into copper nuggets, when you surround a carrot with copper nuggets you get a copper carrot! It's better than a regular carrot but worse than a golden one


![The crafting recipe for copper carrots. A carrot in the center surrounded by 9 copper nuggets on the left, resulting in a copper carrot on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b8e62a7aea9a04f017551549948bedde3dbbe7d.png)


You can eat the copper carrot, but it can also be used to create a new oxidized night vision potion. Created in the same way as a regular night vision potion, but with a copper carrot instead. This version has some unique downsides!

This mod should be compatible with other mods that introduce a copper nugget, but if you notice a compatibility issue please let me know!

If you would like to include this in a modpack or create other content surrounding the mod, you are welcome to do so, let me know if you do though that would be cool to see!

Credits:
Sprites remixed from "Weird Fruits" by KnoblePersona: https://opengameart.org/content/weird-fruits-16x16 - Licensed under https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/

Built using MCreator: https://mcreator.net/ 

MCreator made creating this mod very simple and took what was a very simple fleeting idea to completion in basically record time. I strongly recommend it to bash about in!
